%% branded.tex — Pandoc LaTeX template for DocsifyTemplate
%%
%% ARCHITECTURE: Open/Closed Principle
%% The Lua filter (latex-components.lua) emits pure data macros.
%% This template defines HOW those macros render.
%% To change component appearance: edit macros HERE.
%% The Lua filter never needs to change.
%%
%% MACRO CONTRACT (filter → template):
%%   Card Grid:       \cardgridbegin, \card{icon}{title}{desc}, \cardgridend
%%   Entity Schema:   \entitybegin{name}{parent}, \entityfield{name}{type}{req}{desc}{values}, \entityend
%%   API Endpoint:    \apibegin{method}{path}, \apidesc{text}, \apiparam{name}{type}{req}, \apiresponse{code}, \apiend
%%   Status Flow:     \flowbegin, \flowstate{label}{trigger}{next}{effects}{islast}, \flowend
%%   Directive Table: \directivebegin{title}, \directivecategory{name}, \directive{name}{type}{default}{desc}, \directiveend
%%   Step Type:       \stepbegin{name}{category}, \stepdesc{text}, \stepprop{name}{type}{req}{desc}, \stepexample{code}, \stepend
%%   Config Example:  \configbegin{title}{lang}, \configcode{code}, \configannotation{line}{text}, \configend
%%   Side by Side:    \sidebegin, \sidepanel{title}{content}{language}, \sideend
%%   Mermaid:         skipped (can't render in PDF yet)

\documentclass[11pt, a4paper]{article}

%% ── Packages ──
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage{lmodern}
\usepackage{newunicodechar}

%% ── Emoji fallbacks (pdflatex can't render emoji glyphs) ──
%% Map common emojis to text equivalents so pdflatex doesn't choke.
\newunicodechar{👤}{[user]}
\newunicodechar{📦}{[pkg]}
\newunicodechar{📊}{[chart]}
\newunicodechar{🔄}{[sync]}
\newunicodechar{📋}{[list]}
\newunicodechar{🎯}{[target]}
\newunicodechar{💡}{[idea]}
\newunicodechar{🚀}{[rocket]}
\newunicodechar{⚡}{[bolt]}
\newunicodechar{🔧}{[wrench]}
\newunicodechar{📝}{[note]}
\newunicodechar{🏗}{[build]}
\newunicodechar{✅}{[ok]}
\newunicodechar{❌}{[x]}
\newunicodechar{⚠}{[warn]}
\newunicodechar{🔍}{[search]}
\newunicodechar{🌐}{[web]}
\newunicodechar{📱}{[mobile]}
\newunicodechar{💻}{[pc]}
\newunicodechar{🎨}{[design]}
\newunicodechar{🔑}{[key]}
\newunicodechar{📈}{[up]}
\newunicodechar{⏳}{[wait]}
\newunicodechar{🛠}{[tools]}
\newunicodechar{📄}{[doc]}
\newunicodechar{🔒}{[lock]}
\newunicodechar{✨}{[new]}
\newunicodechar{💾}{[save]}
\newunicodechar{🗂}{[folder]}
\usepackage[margin=2.5cm]{geometry}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{hyperref}
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{tabularx}
\usepackage{longtable}
\usepackage{listings}
\usepackage{tcolorbox}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage{tikz}
\usepackage{amssymb}
\usepackage{amsmath}
\usepackage{etoolbox}

\tcbuselibrary{skins, breakable}

%% ── Brand Colors (from theme.css :root) ──
%% Change these to rebrand the entire document.
\definecolor{accent}{HTML}{0891B2}
\definecolor{accentlight}{HTML}{ECFEFF}
\definecolor{accenttext}{HTML}{0E7490}
\definecolor{surfacepage}{HTML}{FAF9F7}
\definecolor{surfaceraised}{HTML}{F5F5F4}
\definecolor{bordersubtle}{HTML}{E7E5E4}
\definecolor{textprimary}{HTML}{1C1917}
\definecolor{textsecondary}{HTML}{44403C}
\definecolor{textmuted}{HTML}{A8A29E}
\definecolor{techaccent}{HTML}{6366F1}
\definecolor{success}{HTML}{34D399}
\definecolor{methodget}{HTML}{3B82F6}
\definecolor{methodpost}{HTML}{22C55E}
\definecolor{methodput}{HTML}{F59E0B}
\definecolor{methodpatch}{HTML}{F97316}
\definecolor{methoddelete}{HTML}{EF4444}

%% ── Hyperref ──
\hypersetup{
  colorlinks=true,
  linkcolor=accenttext,
  urlcolor=accent,
  citecolor=accent,
  pdfborder={0 0 0}
}

%% ── Header / Footer ──
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
\fancyhead[L]{\textcolor{textmuted}{\small $if(title)$$title$$else$Documentation$endif$}}
\fancyhead[R]{\textcolor{accent}{\small\textbf{DocsifyTemplate}}}
\fancyfoot[C]{\textcolor{textmuted}{\small\thepage}}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0.4pt}
\renewcommand{\headrule}{\hbox to\headwidth{\color{bordersubtle}\leaders\hrule height \headrulewidth\hfill}}
\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0pt}

%% ── Listings styles ──
\lstdefinestyle{code}{
  basicstyle=\ttfamily\small,
  backgroundcolor=\color{surfaceraised},
  frame=single,
  rulecolor=\color{bordersubtle},
  breaklines=true,
  numbers=left,
  numberstyle=\tiny\color{textmuted},
  numbersep=8pt,
  tabsize=2,
  showstringspaces=false,
  keywordstyle=\color{techaccent}\bfseries,
  stringstyle=\color{accenttext},
  commentstyle=\color{textmuted}\itshape,
}
\lstset{style=code}

%% ── Shared utility macros ──
\newcommand{\required}{{\textcolor{methoddelete}{\footnotesize\textbf{required}}}}
\newcommand{\typebadge}[1]{{\footnotesize\colorbox{surfaceraised}{\texttt{#1}}}}

\newcommand{\methodcolor}[1]{%
  \ifstrequal{#1}{GET}{\colorbox{methodget!15}{\textcolor{methodget}{\textbf{\small #1}}}}{}%
  \ifstrequal{#1}{POST}{\colorbox{methodpost!15}{\textcolor{methodpost}{\textbf{\small #1}}}}{}%
  \ifstrequal{#1}{PUT}{\colorbox{methodput!15}{\textcolor{methodput}{\textbf{\small #1}}}}{}%
  \ifstrequal{#1}{PATCH}{\colorbox{methodpatch!15}{\textcolor{methodpatch}{\textbf{\small #1}}}}{}%
  \ifstrequal{#1}{DELETE}{\colorbox{methoddelete!15}{\textcolor{methoddelete}{\textbf{\small #1}}}}{}%
}

%% ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
%% COMPONENT MACROS — Edit these to change how components render.
%% The Lua filter emits calls to these macros with pure data args.
%% ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

%% ── Card Grid ──
\newcommand{\cardgridbegin}{%
  \vspace{1em}%
  \begin{tcolorbox}[colback=surfaceraised, colframe=bordersubtle, arc=4pt, boxrule=0.5pt, breakable]%
}
\newcommand{\card}[3]{% #1=icon #2=title #3=description
  \noindent\textbf{#1\enspace#2}\\
  {\small\textcolor{textsecondary}{#3}}\\[0.6em]%
}
\newcommand{\cardgridend}{%
  \end{tcolorbox}%
  \vspace{0.5em}%
}

%% ── Entity Schema ──
\newcommand{\entitybegin}[2]{% #1=name #2=parent (may be empty)
  \vspace{1em}%
  \begin{tcolorbox}[colback=white, colframe=accent,
    title={\textbf{#1}\ifstrempty{#2}{}{ \textit{\small extends #2}}},
    fonttitle=\large, coltitle=white, colbacktitle=accent,
    arc=4pt, boxrule=0.5pt, breakable, left=2mm, right=2mm]%
  \begin{tabular}{l l c p{0.45\textwidth}}
    \toprule
    \textbf{Field} & \textbf{Type} & \textbf{Req.} & \textbf{Description} \\
    \midrule
}
\newcommand{\entityfield}[5]{% #1=name #2=type #3=required #4=desc #5=values
  \texttt{#1} & \typebadge{#2} &
  \ifstrequal{#3}{true}{\required}{} &
  #4\ifstrempty{#5}{}{ \texttt{\small #5}} \\
}
\newcommand{\entityend}{%
    \bottomrule
  \end{tabular}
  \end{tcolorbox}%
  \vspace{0.5em}%
}

%% ── API Endpoint ──
\newcommand{\apibegin}[2]{% #1=method #2=path
  \vspace{1em}%
  \begin{tcolorbox}[colback=white, colframe=bordersubtle, arc=4pt, boxrule=0.5pt, breakable, left=3mm]%
  \methodcolor{#1}\enspace{\ttfamily\textbf{#2}}\\[0.5em]%
}
\newcommand{\apidesc}[1]{% #1=description
  #1\\[0.3em]%
}
\newcommand{\apiparam}[3]{% #1=name #2=type #3=required
  \texttt{#1} \typebadge{#2} \ifstrequal{#3}{true}{\required}{}\\
}
\newcommand{\apiresponse}[1]{% #1=response code
  \vspace{0.3em}\textbf{Response:}\\[0.3em]%
  {\ttfamily\small\begin{tcolorbox}[colback=surfaceraised, colframe=bordersubtle, arc=2pt, boxrule=0.3pt, left=2mm, right=2mm, top=1mm, bottom=1mm]%
  \obeylines\obeyspaces #1%
  \end{tcolorbox}}%
}
\newcommand{\apiend}{%
  \end{tcolorbox}%
  \vspace{0.5em}%
}

%% ── Status Flow ──
\newcommand{\flowbegin}{%
  \vspace{1em}%
  \begin{tcolorbox}[colback=surfaceraised, colframe=bordersubtle, arc=4pt, boxrule=0.5pt, breakable]%
  \begin{center}%
}
\newcommand{\flowstate}[5]{% #1=label #2=trigger #3=next #4=effects #5=islast
  \fcolorbox{accent}{accentlight}{\textbf{#1}}%
  \ifstrequal{#5}{true}{}{ $$\rightarrow$$ }%
}
\newcommand{\flowend}{%
  \end{center}%
  \end{tcolorbox}%
  \vspace{0.5em}%
}

%% ── Directive Table ──
\newcommand{\directivebegin}[1]{% #1=title
  \vspace{1em}%
  \subsection*{#1}%
  \begin{longtable}{l l p{0.5\textwidth}}
    \toprule
    \textbf{Directive} & \textbf{Type} & \textbf{Description} \\
    \midrule
    \endhead
}
\newcommand{\directivecategory}[1]{% #1=category name
  \multicolumn{3}{l}{\textbf{\textcolor{accent}{#1}}} \\
  \midrule
}
\newcommand{\directive}[4]{% #1=name #2=type #3=default #4=description
  \texttt{#1} & \typebadge{#2} & #4\ifstrempty{#3}{}{ (default: \texttt{#3})} \\
}
\newcommand{\directiveend}{%
    \bottomrule
  \end{longtable}%
  \vspace{0.5em}%
}

%% ── Step Type ──
\newcommand{\stepbegin}[2]{% #1=name #2=category (sync|async)
  \vspace{1em}%
  \begin{tcolorbox}[colback=white, colframe=accent!50, arc=4pt, boxrule=0.5pt, breakable,
    title={\textbf{#1}\enspace\ifstrequal{#2}{async}{%
      \textcolor{techaccent}{\footnotesize\textbf{async}}}{%
      \textcolor{accent}{\footnotesize\textbf{sync}}}},
    coltitle=textprimary, colbacktitle=accentlight]%
}
\newcommand{\stepdesc}[1]{% #1=description
  #1\\[0.3em]%
}
\newcommand{\stepprop}[4]{% #1=name #2=type #3=required #4=description
  \texttt{#1} \typebadge{#2} \ifstrequal{#3}{true}{\required}{} --- {\small #4}\\
}
\newcommand{\stepexample}[1]{% #1=code
  \vspace{0.3em}\textbf{Example:}\\[0.3em]%
  {\ttfamily\small\begin{tcolorbox}[colback=surfaceraised, colframe=bordersubtle, arc=2pt, boxrule=0.3pt, left=2mm, right=2mm, top=1mm, bottom=1mm]%
  \obeylines\obeyspaces #1%
  \end{tcolorbox}}%
}
\newcommand{\stepend}{%
  \end{tcolorbox}%
  \vspace{0.5em}%
}

%% ── Config Example ──
\newcommand{\configbegin}[2]{% #1=title #2=language
  \vspace{1em}%
  \ifstrempty{#1}{}{\paragraph{#1}}%
}
\newcommand{\configcode}[1]{% #1=code
  {\ttfamily\small\begin{tcolorbox}[colback=surfaceraised, colframe=bordersubtle, arc=2pt, boxrule=0.3pt, left=2mm, right=2mm, top=1mm, bottom=1mm]%
  \obeylines\obeyspaces #1%
  \end{tcolorbox}}%
}
\newcommand{\configannotation}[2]{% #1=line number #2=text
  \noindent\tikz\node[circle, fill=accent, text=white, inner sep=1.5pt, font=\tiny\bfseries]{#1};
  {\small #2}\\[0.3em]%
}
\newcommand{\configend}{\vspace{0.5em}}

%% ── Side by Side ──
\newcommand{\sidebegin}{\vspace{1em}\noindent}
\newcommand{\sidepanel}[3]{% #1=title #2=content #3=language (may be empty)
  \begin{minipage}[t]{0.48\textwidth}
    \ifstrempty{#1}{}{\textbf{#1}\\[0.5em]}%
    \ifstrempty{#3}{#2}{{\ttfamily\small\begin{tcolorbox}[colback=surfaceraised, colframe=bordersubtle, arc=2pt, boxrule=0.3pt, left=2mm, right=2mm, top=1mm, bottom=1mm]%
    \obeylines\obeyspaces #2%
    \end{tcolorbox}}}%
  \end{minipage}\hfill%
}
\newcommand{\sideend}{\vspace{0.5em}}

%% ── Mermaid: skipped (can't render in PDF yet) ──

%% ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

%% ── Title setup ──
$if(title)$
\title{%
  {\textcolor{accent}{\rule{\textwidth}{2pt}}}\\[1em]%
  {\Huge\textbf{\textcolor{textprimary}{$title$}}}\\[0.5em]%
  $if(subtitle)${\Large\textcolor{textsecondary}{$subtitle$}}\\[0.5em]$endif$%
  {\textcolor{accent}{\rule{\textwidth}{2pt}}}%
}
$endif$
$if(author)$\author{$author$}$endif$
\date{$if(date)$$date$$else$\today$endif$}

%% ── Document ──
\begin{document}

$if(title)$
\maketitle
\thispagestyle{empty}
\newpage
$endif$

$if(toc)$
\tableofcontents
\newpage
$endif$

$body$

\end{document}
